channel.title: AI Daily - AI News · Tools · Monetization · Productivity
channel.description: Hourly-updated AI blog covering the latest AI news, tool reviews, money-making methods, and productivity tips.

item.title: AI News Roundup May 2026 Week 3: Schmidt Booed, arXiv Bans AI Papers, Open-Source Agent Sandboxes, and the API Key Leak Crisis
item.description: May 2026 week 3 AI news roundup: Ex-Google CEO Eric Schmidt booed off stage at commencement; arXiv announces 1-year ban for AI-generated papers; 435K+ AI API keys found exposed on GitHub; AnyFrame open-source sandbox for AI agents; CLI-Anything makes all software agent-native; Yum Brands + NVIDIA deploy AI in 500 restaurants; archivists use LLMs for handwriting transcription at scale. The week the AI trust deficit became undeniable.

item.title: AI Productivity May 2026: ServiceNow Autonomous Workforce, Productive 5.0, Freshworks No-Code Agents, and the Rise of Agent Governance
item.description: May 2026 AI productivity deep dive: ServiceNow Knowledge 2026 unveils autonomous AI workforce resolving IT cases 99% faster; Productive 5.0 launches always-on agents for professional services; Freshworks Freddy AI Agent Studio goes no-code; Red Hat AI Factory + NVIDIA OpenShell for secure autonomous agents; Okta + AWS deliver identity foundation for AI agents. The era of enterprise agent governance arrives.

item.title: AI Monetization in May 2026: Figma's 46% Surge, the Pricing Revolution, and the ROI Test
item.description: May 2026 AI monetization deep dive: Figma Q1 revenue surges 46% to $333M driven by AI feature monetization; SBIGrowth study reveals companies that charge separately for AI meet revenue targets at 84% rate vs 58% that bundle for free; Anthropic projected 10-80x revenue growth; the 6 emerging AI pricing models reshaping enterprise software; Creative Strategies' ROI test framework for measuring AI monetization success.

item.title: Best AI Tools of May 2026: ChatGPT Finances, Anthropic Orbit, Coder Agents, Claude for M365 Hits GA
item.description: May 2026 new AI tool roundup: ChatGPT Finances links to 12,000+ banks; Anthropic Orbit delivers proactive daily briefs; Coder Agents launch self-hosted model-agnostic agents; Claude for M365 reaches GA for Excel/PPT/Word; Dataiku Cobuild on Snowflake; OCI Enterprise AI with Grok 4.3. Plus 5 key trends.

item.title: AI News This Week: GPT-5.5 Free for All, Anthropic Mythos Finds Thousands of Zero-Days, Apple Pays $250M
item.description: May 2026 week 3 AI news roundup: OpenAI GPT-5.5 Instant goes free for all users with 52.5% hallucination reduction; Anthropic Mythos Project Glasswing reveals thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities; Apple settles misleading AI ad lawsuit for $250M; DeepSeek V4 nears frontier performance; Cerebras IPO surges 70%; NIST signs pre-deployment testing agreements.

item.title: AI Productivity May 2026: Google Cloud Next '26, Red Hat AI Factory, Productive 5.0 — The Agentic Enterprise Goes Mainstream
item.description: May 2026 AI productivity report: Google Cloud Next '26 reveals 75% of customers use AI products; Red Hat AI Factory with NVIDIA launches OpenShell sandboxed runtime for autonomous agents; Productive 5.0 brings always-on AI agents to professional services; Coupa Compose launches 20+ procurement agents; Boomi and Couchbase power 90,000+ production AI agents. Plus: the AI productivity paradox — why efficiency gains come with cognitive costs.

item.title: AI Monetization May 2026: OpenAI Ads Manager, AI Revenue Projected at $200B, Big Tech Earnings Show Cloud AI Surge
item.description: May 2026 AI monetization roundup: OpenAI launches Ads Manager targeting $2.5B ad revenue in 2026; Menlo Ventures projects AI revenue could reach $200B, up 5x from $37B; Big Tech Q1 earnings show cloud AI revenue surging 63% YoY; publisher AI licensing deals drive 125% revenue growth at USA Today; News Corp targets $1B EBITDA through AI content licensing; Figma raises revenue forecast on AI adoption; Goldman Sachs warns 95% of AI investments haven't delivered ROI yet.

item.title: AI Tools of May 2026: Coder Agents, Gemma 4, Snyk+Claude, Qoder 1.0 — The Agent Tooling Era Arrives
item.description: May 2026 AI tools roundup: Coder Agents launches self-hosted AI coding agents in beta, Google DeepMind releases Gemma 4 under Apache 2.0, Snyk embeds Claude for AI-powered AppSec, Alibaba Qoder 1.0 becomes an autonomous agent development workstation, TikTok Dreamina Seedance 2.0 brings AI video to advertisers, and Opsera partners with Cursor for DevOps agents. A deep dive into the tools redefining developer workflows.

item.title: AI News Roundup May 2026: OpenAI's $122B, Mythos Recalled, Cyber Offense Threshold Crossed
item.description: May 2026 AI news roundup: OpenAI closes $122B at $852B valuation — largest private financing in history; Anthropic pulls Claude Mythos after it breaks UK cyber range; AI cyber-offensive capability doubles every 4 months; Google's DiLoCo enables distributed training across global data centers; open-weight coding models from China close the gap. Plus: agent enterprise adoption, healthcare breakthroughs, and the geopolitics of AI governance.

item.title: AI Productivity in May 2026: The Agent Engineering Era — From Assistance to Autonomous Execution
item.description: May 2026 AI productivity report: Freshworks launches Freddy AI Agent Studio with MCP Gateway; ServiceNow AI Control Tower redefines enterprise governance; HubSpot opens CRM APIs for agent autonomy; the 10 hottest agent work categories ranked; enterprise productivity data shows 65% efficiency gains. A complete guide to the agentic era.

item.title: AI Monetization in May 2026: Codex Earns Its First Dollar, Sensor Tower Reports 232% Growth, and the Agent Economy Takes Off
item.description: May 2026 AI monetization update: OpenAI Codex autonomously completes a bounty for $16.88, the first real-world AI-earned income; Sensor Tower reports 232% YoY growth in gen AI app revenue to $6.1B; Goldman Sachs predicts margin inflection in H1 2026; OpenAI pivots to advertising with $2.5B projected revenue. Analysis of consumption-era pricing and creator monetization strategies.

item.title: Best AI Tools of May 2026: The $20 Subscription War and the Open-Source Revolution
item.description: May 2026 AI tools guide: ChatGPT Plus vs Claude Pro vs Google AI Pro comparison; trending open-source tools (caveman 53K stars, openclaw 368K, mempalace 51K); developer toolchain recommendations; the free AI revolution with Meta Muse Spark.

item.title: May 2026 AI Model War: GPT-5.5 vs Claude Mythos vs DeepSeek V4
item.description: May 2026 AI model landscape deep dive: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Instant cuts hallucinations by 52.5%; Anthropic's Claude Mythos breaks the UK AISI cyber range then gets pulled; DeepSeek V4 Preview narrows the gap with open-weight architecture. Strategic divergence and industry implications analyzed.

item.title: AI Productivity in 2026: From Tools to Agents — A Complete Guide
item.description: 2026 AI productivity guide: the Copilot-to-Agent paradigm shift, Productive 5.0 AI agents, OpenAI Chronicle pattern recognition, Harness report on the productivity measurement crisis, and actionable productivity stacks for knowledge workers.

item.title: How to Make Money with AI in 2026: From Side Hustles to Enterprise Monetization
item.description: Complete guide to AI monetization in 2026: RaaS paradigm shift, creator economy AI income strategies ($500-$8,000/month), selling AI agents as subscription products, AI automation consulting, and the China vs US monetization divergence. With realistic earning timelines.

item.title: Best AI Tools of May 2026: From GitHub Trending to Product Hunt Winners, What Actually Works
item.description: May 2026 AI tools review: everything-claude-code 173K stars, caveman 53K, Cursor vs Claude Code vs Copilot, Codex on mobile, Superset 2.0, ElevenAgents by ElevenLabs, and the lean stack strategy to fight subscription fatigue.

item.title: The $830 Billion AI Infrastructure Race of 2026: Cloud Giants, Agent Economy, and the New Global Arms Race
item.description: May 2026: Global AI infrastructure spending surges to $830B across 9 cloud providers. AWS leads at $230B+, Microsoft $190B, Google $180-190B. Agentic AI priorities surge 31.5%. Data center NIMBYism emerges as a first-order bottleneck.

item.title: Enterprise AI ROI in 2026: 8 Real Case Studies With Measurable Results
item.description: May 2026 enterprise AI productivity cases with real ROI: Conduent saves $18M in 6 months, Home Depot voice AI 4x faster, Georgia-Pacific saves $1M/machine, Forrester finds 331-391% ROI. Manufacturing, finance, customer service, and translation with measurable results.

item.title: AI Pet Videos Are Making People Rich: The $10K/Month Side Hustle Taking Over Social Media in 2026
item.description: How AI-generated talking pet videos generate $10K+ per month: Chengdu MCN earns $69K/month with an AI Bichon character, YouTube creators pull $15K/month from AdSense alone. Complete tutorial, 5 revenue streams, and platform risk analysis.

item.title: AI Tools Super Month May 2026: GPT-5.5 Goes Free, Gemma 4 Drops, and the Developer Tooling Revolution
item.description: May 2026 is the biggest month in AI tools history: GPT-5.5 Instant free for everyone, Google DeepMind Gemma 4 open-source, Grok 4.3 with 1M context, Coder Agents beta, ChatGPT Finance, Claude for Small Business. Complete roundup and analysis.

item.title: AI Self-Replication Achieved, First AI-Written Zero-Day Exploit Found: The Week AI Security Got Real
item.description: May 2026 delivered two historic firsts: Palisade Research demonstrated AI self-replication in a controlled environment, and Google TAG caught the first AI-generated zero-day exploit in the wild. Claude Mythos conquers UK AISI cyber ranges.

item.title: The Proactive AI Era: Anthropic Orbit, ChatGPT Pulse, and Google's Ambition to Own Your Morning
item.description: May 2026 marks AI's shift from reactive to proactive. Anthropic's Orbit delivers daily briefs from Gmail/Slack/GitHub, ChatGPT Pulse personalizes your morning news, and Google I/O unveils Gemini Proactive Assistance across its entire ecosystem.

item.title: ChatGPT Ads Manager Is Live: Inside OpenAI's $100B Ad Ambition and the New AI Monetization Wave
item.description: OpenAI launched Ads Manager on May 5, 2026 — a self-serve ad platform opening ChatGPT to advertisers. Inside the economics ($100M annualized in 6 weeks), the platform mechanics, and what it means for the future of AI monetization.

item.title: AI Tools Roundup May 2026: General Compute ASIC Cloud, Claude Goes Big on SMB & Legal, Boomi Agent Governance
item.description: May 2026 AI tools roundup: General Compute launches ASIC-first inference cloud for AI agents; Anthropic pushes Claude into Small Business and Legal; Boomi adds enterprise agent governance; Mixpanel AI; Google I/O preview.

item.title: Apple vs. OpenAI: The Partnership That Never Was — and What It Means for the AI Platform War
item.description: The Apple-OpenAI partnership has collapsed with OpenAI preparing legal action. ChatGPT integration handled less than 5% of all Siri requests. iOS 27 pivots to multi-provider AI. Analysis of the AI platform war's new phase.

item.title: AI Productivity 2026: Agent-Centric Workflows, Real ROI Data & Practical Playbook
item.description: 2026 AI productivity guide: agentic AI workflow architecture with 2-10x gains, real enterprise ROI (Suzano 95% faster, Linde 92% cut, Vanta 1800+ hrs reclaimed), personal AI workers stack, 3-layer maturity model, and actionable tips.

item.title: AI Monetization 2026: 7 Proven Ways to Make Money with AI — From Side Hustle to Full-Time Income
item.description: 2026 AI monetization guide: 7 proven ways to make money with AI including freelancing, automation services, faceless YouTube, selling AI prompts, no-code Micro SaaS, AI consulting, and digital products. Real earnings data included.

item.title: May 2026 AI Tools Guide: New Model Releases, Developer Platforms & Best Picks
item.description: May 2026 AI tools roundup: Claude Opus 4.7 & Mythos, GPT-5.5 Instant, Gemini 3.1 Pro, AWS Kiro, Cursor 3, Perplexity PC, Kling 3.0, Nano Banana Pro, Claude Design, Amazon Bedrock AI payments, and 30+ tool picks by use case.

item.title: AI Landscape May 2026: Record Funding, Agentic AI Regulation, Apple Opens Siri to Third Parties
item.description: May 2026 AI landscape overview: OpenAI's record $122B round, Anthropic's $40B Google deal and SpaceX Colossus partnership, Apple iOS 27 opens to third-party AI, White House pre-release safety reviews, CISA agentic AI guidance.

item.title: AI Productivity in 2026: Autonomous Agents, Workflow Automation & Measured Gains
item.description: 2026 productivity playbook: shift from chatbots to autonomous agents with OpenClaw and n8n, context-aware AI workflows, unified workspaces, role-specific time savings (PMs 8.5h/wk, devs 12h/wk, founders 15h/wk).

item.title: How to Make Money with AI in 2026: 7 Proven Side Hustles & Real Earnings
item.description: Proven AI monetization strategies for 2026: AI Automation Agency ($5K-$15K/mo), selling AI agents as subscriptions ($47-$197/mo), AI consulting ($100-$300/hr), vibe coding, Faceless YouTube, and real earnings data from practitioners.

item.title: Best AI Tools of May 2026: 30 Essential Tools to Supercharge Your Workflow
item.description: Best AI tools of May 2026: GitHub trending open-source projects (mempalace, graphify, caveman), Needle 26M on-device model, Cursor vs Copilot review, Claude vs GPT-5.4 vs Gemini comparison, team-tested productivity picks.

item.title: AI News May 2026: GPT-5.5-Cyber, Google I/O, Orbital Computing & Healthcare Breakthroughs
item.description: May 2026 AI news roundup: OpenAI launches GPT-5.5-Cyber, Anthropic leases SpaceX supercomputer, Google Gemini expansion, AI detects heart disease from bone scans, Harvard ER study, UK Sovereign AI fund.

item.title: AI Productivity in 2026: Agentic Workflows, Automation & Practical Guides
item.description: Practical AI productivity guide for 2026: agentic workflows with Claude MCP & Zapier, cross-app automation with n8n/Make, meeting assistants, prompt engineering. Real solutions you can implement today.

item.title: The AI Automation Agency: How to Build a One-Person Business That Prints Money in 2026
item.description: 2026 is the year of the AI Automation Agency (AAA). Real case studies, tool stacks, and a step-by-step playbook for building a one-person business that generates $5K-$15K/month.

item.title: Best AI Tools to Try in May 2026 (Including Free Options)
item.description: Curated recommendations for the hottest AI tools in May 2026, covering video generation, coding assistants, content creation, and productivity boosters with free tiers.

item.title: Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI in Enterprise Market Share for the First Time
item.description: Latest data from May 2026: Anthropic claims 34.4% of paid enterprise customers vs OpenAI's 32.3%. Google also warns AI-powered cyberattacks are now operational.

item.title: AI Daily Launches — Tracking the Latest in AI Every Hour
item.description: AI Daily is now live! An AI-powered blog that automatically searches and reports the latest AI news, tool recommendations, money-making methods, and productivity tips every hour.
